creator: crapsh@monkeybrains.net
text:
When you hit the play button on a youtube video, the flash content fails.  The little flash window becomes white.

I'm not sure if it matters, but I have an nvidia graphics card.  I have compiz installed but am not using it (that also is busted...  windows show up as all black... my motherboard has a GeForce 6150 chip in it.

How-To-Repeat: 
As root:
pkg_delete  linux-flashplugin\*
cd /usr/ports/www/linux-flashplugin9 && make install clean

As user:
nspluginwrapper -v -a -i /usr/local/lib/npapi/linux-flashplugin/libflashplayer.so
# restart FireFox
# go to youtube.com and get bummed out.
